title: 912. Sort an Array
question:
Given an array of integers nums, sort the array in ascending order.

 

Example 1:

Input: [5,2,3,1]
Output: [1,2,3,5]

Example 2:

Input: [5,1,1,2,0,0]
Output: [0,0,1,1,2,5]

 

Note:

  1. 1 <= A.length <= 10000
  2. -50000 <= A[i] <= 50000
code: class Solution(object):\u000A    def sortArray(self, nums):\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        :type nums: List[int]\u000A        :rtype: List[int]\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        return sorted(nums)
